notes: Healthcare-focused security framework. HITRUST CSF integrates requirements from HIPAA, NIST, ISO, PCI, and other frameworks into a single certifiable framework. Widely used in healthcare and financial services.

data.description: Certifiable security framework integrating HIPAA, NIST, ISO, PCI requirements.
data.notes: Version 11.x current. Organized by control categories and implementation levels (1-3). Used for HITRUST certification assessments. The framework is not freely available — requires a HITRUST MyCSF subscription to access full control specifications. Three assessment types: e1 (essentials, 1 year), i1 (implemented, 1 year), r2 (risk-based, 2 years).

versions_available.note: Version 11.x. Streamlined control selection, updated threat-adaptive controls.
Previous major version. Still referenced in some compliance documentation.

urls.note: MyCSF subscription tool — required for full control access
